overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing a black sports car driving through Night City's downtown district at night during heavy rain. The scene features dense neon signage, holographic advertisements, towering corporate buildings, and moderate traffic on wet multi-lane streets.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered urban highway transitioning to open street

agents.ego_description: driving black sports car under overpass and emerging onto wet city street with neon reflections

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass covering the street with support pillars visible
tall buildings covered in bright neon advertisements and corporate signage
commercial structures with large illuminated digital displays
tall skyscraper with illuminated windows rising above the street

segments.scene_description: Driving under a massive concrete overpass with neon-lit commercial buildings lining both sides. The wet asphalt reflects the vibrant neon signage as the vehicle emerges from the covered section into the open street.

scene_state.functional_zone: large urban intersection with pedestrian crosswalks

events.description: approaching intersection with red traffic light visible ahead
crossing intersection as traffic light changes to green

agents.ego_description: navigating through city intersection, maintaining speed through crosswalk area

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi driving perpendicular through intersection from left side
silver sedan waiting at traffic light on the right side of road

entered.detail: yellow striped pedestrian crosswalk markings on wet asphalt
overhead traffic signal suspended above the intersection

segments.scene_description: Approaching and crossing a large illuminated intersection with yellow crosswalk markings. A yellow taxi passes through from the left while neon-lit corporate towers rise in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense commercial corridor with massive digital billboards

agents.ego_description: cruising through commercial district surrounded by towering digital advertisements and holographic displays

entered.detail: massive curved digital screen displaying animated advertisements on building facade
tall building covered in multiple layers of glowing digital signage
raised highway structure with vehicles visible on upper level

segments.scene_description: Driving through a dense commercial canyon lined with massive digital billboards and holographic advertisements. The street is flanked by elevated highways and towering corporate structures covered in neon signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with giant holographic displays

events.description: entering open plaza area with massive holographic phoenix display visible ahead
car turns right around plaza perimeter following the road curve

agents.ego_description: navigating around the perimeter of a large plaza featuring giant holographic advertisements and light displays

notable_agents.action: blue sedan driving alongside in adjacent lane through the plaza

entered.detail: massive golden-orange holographic phoenix with spread wings floating above buildings
large blue holographic whale swimming in the air above the plaza
open circular plaza with reflective wet pavement and surrounding neon structures
rounded building facade covered in multiple tiers of digital billboards

segments.scene_description: Entering a vast open plaza dominated by a massive glowing holographic phoenix and whale floating above the buildings. The car navigates around the plaza perimeter as colorful light reflects off the wet pavement.

events.description: entering covered underpass beneath elevated highway structure with artificial lighting

agents.ego_description: driving through covered underpass with artificial lighting, emerging back to open street

entered.detail: concrete underpass with support columns and overhead highway deck
concrete walls lining the sides of the covered roadway

segments.scene_description: Entering a covered underpass beneath the elevated highway system, transitioning from the open plaza to a more enclosed corridor with artificial lighting before emerging back onto the open street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive through a rain-slicked cyberpunk metropolis, transitioning from enclosed concrete corridors into a vast, holographic plaza before returning to the city's subterranean arteries. It begins beneath a massive concrete overpass where neon-lit commercial buildings reflect off the wet asphalt, moving forward as the vehicle emerges into the open air to cross a large, illuminated intersection. The scene then tightens into a dense commercial canyon flanked by towering corporate structures and massive digital billboards, with elevated highways looming overhead. As the road opens up, the camera enters a vast plaza dominated by glowing holographic whales and a phoenix floating above the skyline, casting colorful light across the pavement. Finally, the vehicle steers away from the open square and dives back into a covered underpass, shifting from the brilliant holographic glow to the artificial lighting of an enclosed corridor.
